description: INTERSECT of two SELECT statements returns only rows present in both result sets
name: select_intersect
query_sql:
-- @name FindCommonContacts
-- @returns :many
SELECT name, email FROM users INTERSECT SELECT name, email FROM contacts
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE contacts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL);
